sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n19776" key="belostasi/a" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">βελο-στᾰσία</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n19776.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">range</tr_> or <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">battery of warlike engines</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1204.tlg001:22:11" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Ath.Mech.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">22.11</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
